'''竏嗟-dh-b-j''' ('''kaladhbejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mobilise|mobilise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-dh-b-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mobilise|mobilise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗟-dh-b-j
|-
! Lemma
| kaladhbejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiladhbejoko|thiladhbejoko]] || [[word:jiladhbejoko|jiladhbejoko]] || [[word:shiladhbejoko|shiladhbejoko]] || [[word:kiladhbejoko|kiladhbejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuladhbejoko|thuthuladhbejoko]] || [[word:jujuladhbejoko|jujuladhbejoko]] || [[word:shushuladhbejoko|shushuladhbejoko]] || [[word:kukuladhbejoko|kukuladhbejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuladhbejoko|thuladhbejoko]] || [[word:juladhbejoko|juladhbejoko]] || [[word:shuladhbejoko|shuladhbejoko]] || [[word:kuladhbejoko|kuladhbejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuladhbejoko|thuladhbejoko]] || [[word:juladhbejoko|juladhbejoko]] || [[word:shuladhbejoko|shuladhbejoko]] || [[word:kuladhbejoko|kuladhbejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theladhbejoko|theladhbejoko]] || [[word:jeladhbejoko|jeladhbejoko]] || [[word:sheladhbejoko|sheladhbejoko]] || [[word:keladhbejoko|keladhbejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholadhbejoko|thotholadhbejoko]] || [[word:jojoladhbejoko|jojoladhbejoko]] || [[word:shosholadhbejoko|shosholadhbejoko]] || [[word:kokoladhbejoko|kokoladhbejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholadhbejoko|tholadhbejoko]] || [[word:joladhbejoko|joladhbejoko]] || [[word:sholadhbejoko|sholadhbejoko]] || [[word:koladhbejoko|koladhbejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholadhbejoko|tholadhbejoko]] || [[word:joladhbejoko|joladhbejoko]] || [[word:sholadhbejoko|sholadhbejoko]] || [[word:koladhbejoko|koladhbejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦladhbejoko|thﾃｦladhbejoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦladhbejoko|jﾃｦladhbejoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦladhbejoko|shﾃｦladhbejoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦladhbejoko|kﾃｦladhbejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathaladhbejoko|thathaladhbejoko]] || [[word:jajaladhbejoko|jajaladhbejoko]] || [[word:shashaladhbejoko|shashaladhbejoko]] || [[word:kakaladhbejoko|kakaladhbejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thaladhbejoko|thaladhbejoko]] || [[word:jaladhbejoko|jaladhbejoko]] || [[word:shaladhbejoko|shaladhbejoko]] || [[word:kaladhbejoko|kaladhbejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thaladhbejoko|thaladhbejoko]] || [[word:jaladhbejoko|jaladhbejoko]] || [[word:shaladhbejoko|shaladhbejoko]] || [[word:kaladhbejoko|kaladhbejoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shaladhbejithi|shaladhbejithi]] || [[word:shaladhbejiji|shaladhbejiji]] || [[word:shaladhbejishi|shaladhbejishi]] || [[word:shaladhbejiki|shaladhbejiki]]

|}
